violations.text: Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. Medicine was relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

Food packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
Single service utensils were observed stored on the floor. Single service utensils must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

The hand-washing sinks in the establishment were lacking paper towels at the time of inspection. Per the PIC, waiting on an order for supplies. PIC acquired paper towels from store at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

At the time of inspection, dishes and utensils were observed in the kitchen hand washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Items removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Chemical spray bottles was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. (Spray bottles were moved to the floor below equipment at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Dirty wiping rags were observed in a bucket of water in the food prep sink. The Food Prep Sink is to be used for food preparation only. Bucket of rags was removed at the time of inspection. Food prep sink was properly sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023
Foods were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and the kitchen areas. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Scoops used for dry ingredients were observed stored with the handles in the food. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023
At the time of inspection, the 3 bay sink was observed to be lacking drain stoppers to properly fill and hold water in the 3 bay compartments. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the prep table shelving/legs were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2023
